steps.title: Identify what difference needs emphasizing
steps.content: The notes show one sculpture displays a concrete phrase while the other is an abstract form—a clear contrast in how each uses neon. This form difference is the key distinction the student must highlight.

steps.title: Find the answer capturing this specific difference
steps.content: Choice A directly contrasts the form: “one spells out a phrase while the other is decidedly more abstract.” The other choices either frame this difference as secondary to neon's broader uses, or shift focus to dates. That matches choice A — A is correct.
